name: Hostfully Vacation Rental Property Management API
what_it_does: Hostfully vacation rental property management REST API for short-term rental operators and property managers to manage listings, reservations, guest communications, channel distribution, and operations through Hostfully's PMS (Property Management System) and digital guidebook platform — enabling multi-channel distribution to Airbnb, VRBO, Booking.com, and direct booking with unified calendar and rate management. Enables AI agents to manage property listing for multi-channel vacation rental automation, handle reservation management for booking lifecycle automation, access guest communication for message automation, retrieve availability calendar for rate and inventory automation, manage owner statement for financial reporting automation, handle cleaning task for operations scheduling automation, access digital guidebook for guest experience automation, retrieve channel distribution for OTA sync automation, manage dynamic pricing for revenue optimization automation, and integrate Hostfully with channel managers, payment processors, and smart home platforms for end-to-end vacation rental automation.
use_cases: Synchronizing vacation rental reservations across Airbnb, VRBO, and direct booking for channel management agents
Automating guest communication messages at booking, check-in, and checkout milestones for PMS automation agents
Managing dynamic pricing and availability calendar for short-term rental revenue optimization automation agents
Scheduling cleaning and maintenance tasks between reservations for operations management automation agents
not_for: Long-term residential property management (Hostfully is short-term vacation rental focused)
Hotel property management (Hostfully is STR/vacation rental, not traditional hotel PMS)
Commercial property management (Hostfully is residential/vacation property focused)
best_when: A vacation rental operator or property management company wanting AI agents to manage multi-channel listing distribution, reservation lifecycle, guest communications, and operations through Hostfully's vacation rental PMS.
avoid_when: CHANNEL SYNC HAS LATENCY: Hostfully channel updates to Airbnb, VRBO, etc. propagate with delay (minutes to hours); automated instant cross-channel calendar sync assumption creates double-booking risk during propagation window; automated must account for sync latency and implement gap buffers. WEBHOOK SETUP REQUIRED: Hostfully webhooks require configuration per account; automated passive event notification without webhook setup creates missed events; automated must configure webhook endpoints for relevant events. RATE MAPPING PER CHANNEL: Hostfully channel-specific rates may differ from base rate; automated uniform rate assumption creates channel-specific pricing discrepancies; automated must configure channel rate modifiers correctly. PROPERTY APPROVAL ON CHANNELS: Hostfully listings on Airbnb/VRBO require channel approval; automated instant listing availability on new channels creates pending_approval status; automated must account for channel onboarding approval time.

auth.notes: Hostfully uses API key for authentication. REST API with JSON. San Francisco, CA HQ. Founded 2015 by Margot Schmorak and David Jacoby. Products: Property Management System (PMS), Digital Guidebook, Channel Manager, Owner Portal. SDKs: None public. Channels: Airbnb, VRBO, Booking.com, Expedia, direct booking. Competes with Guesty and Hostaway for vacation rental PMS.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free trial available; production requires paid subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Starter $109/month (up to 4 properties), Professional $179/month (up to 10), Premium $239/month (unlimited)
pricing.notes: San Francisco CA. Monthly subscription by property count. API included in subscription. Free trial.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; reservation and calendar APIs throttled; webhooks for booking events

known_agent_gotchas: CHANNEL SYNC PROPAGATION DELAY: Hostfully calendar and availability updates to Airbnb/VRBO have propagation delay; automated instant cross-channel sync assumption creates double-booking risk; automated must implement booking gap buffers and handle sync latency

PROPERTY UID REQUIRED FOR ALL OPERATIONS: Hostfully uses property UIDs for all property-scoped operations; automated property-name-based lookup creates property_not_found; automated must store and use Hostfully property UIDs

WEBHOOK MUST BE CONFIGURED PER ACCOUNT: Hostfully webhooks require explicit configuration in account settings; automated passive event notification creates missed booking events; automated must configure webhook endpoint before relying on event-driven processing

LEAD RESERVATION STATUS FLOW: Hostfully reservations have status flow (Inquiry → Hold → Confirmed → Checked_In → Checked_Out → Cancelled); automated binary confirmed/cancelled assumption misses intermediate states; automated must handle full reservation state machine

BLOCKING CALENDAR FOR OWNER HOLD: Owner blocks (preventing guest bookings) require separate calendar block entry; automated booking-only calendar assumption creates missing owner hold functionality; automated must use block endpoints for non-booking unavailability
agent_readiness.security_notes: Vacation rental PMS. CCPA, GDPR, PCI-DSS. API key. US. Guest and reservation data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Vacation rental platform. CCPA, GDPR. API key. US. Guest and reservation data.
